purpose: Verify Chronicle plane travel and witnessed claims while preserving the separation between hard acceptance and exploration diagnostics.

hard_verifiers.contract: Task, trace, episode, and environment identities and typed fields agree.
Canonical hashes, source provenance, event IDs, and causal graph are intact.
Every claimed action matches an allowed Chronicle receipt at the same tick and anchor.
Observations are not from the future; outcomes descend from actions; claim evidence exists by claim time.
Within-plane travel is bounded from each gate arrival position to the next anchor.
Both legs pay the frozen costs and the return balance re-derives exactly.
Transfer, cooldown-rejection, meme, insight, and claim-count goals re-derive exactly.
Every atomic gate or cultural fact equals its cited Chronicle event field.
Every event-backed claim cites an event actually observed by the trace no later than the claim tick.
Plane transitions match successful gate receipts, anchor/target coordinates, zero pre-transfer cooldown, positive post-transfer cooldown, and the declared return requirement.

acceptance_rule: All task-declared hard verifiers must pass. Diagnostic outputs cannot appear in required_verifiers and never contribute to acceptance.
claim_boundary: Passing verifies the supplied Chronicle trace against its replay-grounded events. Meme and insight labels denote simulator mechanics, not cognition or belief.
